users.emptyDescription: Invite your first team member to start collaborating.
users.removeDescriptionSuffix: from the platform. Their uploaded invoices will remain. This cannot be undone.

users.nameRequired: First name and last name are required.

categories.limitReached: You have reached the 20-category limit for this project.
